name: John MacArthur
title: Pastor & Author
bio: American pastor-teacher who served as pastor of Grace Community Church in Sun Valley, California, for over 55 years. He was also president of The Master's University and Seminary, a prolific author of over 150 books, and the voice behind the 'Grace to You' radio broadcast.
faith: MacArthur was one of the most influential Bible expositors of his generation. His verse-by-verse preaching style and commitment to biblical inerrancy shaped Reformed evangelical Christianity. His MacArthur Study Bible has sold over 2 million copies.
